scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/server && npm run build -w @file-kanban/ui
scripts.lint: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run lint -w @file-kanban/ui
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:built --workspaces --if-present
